title: Vivi Tries to Stop the War
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on vivi tries to stop the war, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Tries to Stop the War. Alubarna becomes the battlefield where Koza, Cobra’s army, and Crocodile’s manipulation finally meet. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: If you're the only hope there is of stopping all that...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Then you have to survive no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So no matter what happens to any of us here...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is a fight that you set up...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You left your country for several years,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: To go up against an organization you knew almost nothing about...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't think that you're fighting alone anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Fufufu...! Seems the princess got away.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...The agents should be done with their tasks in Alabama by now. Contact them...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: have gone far enough, straw-hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And yet she's always trying to help everyone and everything around her.

summary: This part develops vivi tries to stop the war and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
